title: Amtech S8170 5W COB LED worklight
features: BRIGHT OUTPUT: This 5W portable worklight uses COB (chip on board) LED technology and has a super bright 350 Lumen output
VERSATILE: With a soft touch finish and a magnetic base and a swivel hanging hook for hands free use, it is powered by 3 AA batteries (included)
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and tool products come with a 36 month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected.
